title: Sterling BPL125 25mm Padlock Brass
features: Anti-pick mushroom pins and stainless steel pins
description: The Sterling 25mm light Profile Brass padlock comes complete with 2-keys. It is a mid-range security padlock, suitable for use in the home, garage, workshop, shed, for lock-up's and commercial use. Manufactured to exacting standards - with a 10-Year product guarantee. It has a hardened steel chrome plated shackle for extra protection with a solid Brass body and cylinder together with the stainless steel springs helps give it extra protection against corrosion. It uses a standard section keyway, enabling easy re-cutting of additional keys as required by the user. Sterling products are equal to the best in the market and are backed with guarantees of up to 10 years. Sterling is a brand of burger-wächter one of the largest manufactures of security products in the world. Burger-wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, Safes, post boxes and access control solutions.
